channel.title: Site surveys on Cray Site Init
channel.description: Recent content in Site surveys on Cray Site Init

item.title: Site Questionaire
item.description: This document describes the site information customers must have available before beginning an installation of CSM as part of Shasta v1.4. These instructions are only valid for the Shasta v1.4 release with CSM >=0.8.0 and CSI >=1.5.0 The CSM questionnaire outlines information needed to seed an installation of CSM. Also included is an abridged overview of Shasta to help new customers understand the context of this configuration. Glossary Shasta Overview The diagram below is an abstract view into how a Shasta environment is structured.
